composition.Programmer 1:
Implement the backend code for the 'PetAdoptionCenter' web application.
- The backend must be implemented in Python using a web framework (e.g., Flask).
- The website should be accessible via the local port 5000, with the first page accessible at route '/' (Dashboard page).
- Implement routing for all frontend pages, ensuring each route corresponds to the frontend code.
- Implement file read and write operations for all data files in the 'data' directory, starting from the first line, using plain text without encryption.
- The backend should handle data management for users, pets, adoption applications, favorites, messages, adoption history, and shelters.
- The backend must support all functionalities described in the requirements document, including browsing pets, submitting applications, managing favorites, messaging shelters, user profile management, and admin panel operations.
- Frontend code files to be developed based on this backend  dashboard.html, pet_listings.html, pet_details.html, add_pet.html, adoption_application.html, my_applications.html, favorites.html, messages.html, user_profile.html, admin_panel.html.
composition.Programmer 2:
Develop the frontend code for the 'PetAdoptionCenter' web application.
- Develop HTML pages for all 10 pages listed in the requirements, using the specified element IDs and page titles.
- All URLs in the frontend code should be routes defined in the backend, not static HTML file names.
- Implement UI elements as described, including buttons, inputs, dropdowns, grids, tables, and containers with the specified IDs.
- Ensure navigation between pages uses the backend routes.
- Implement client-side interactivity as needed to support filtering, searching, and navigation.
- The frontend should be responsive and user-friendly, matching the functional requirements of the application.
composition.Programmer 3:
Integrate and test the full 'PetAdoptionCenter' web application.
- Integrate backend and frontend components.
- Perform end-to-end testing of all functionalities  browsing pets, filtering, searching, viewing details, submitting applications, managing favorites, messaging, profile updates, and admin panel management.
- Verify data persistence and correctness in all text files under the 'data' directory.
- Ensure the application starts at the Dashboard page and all navigation works correctly.
- Fix bugs and optimize performance and usability.
- Prepare deployment instructions for running the application locally on port 5000.
